text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She shells sea shells by the sea shore! She sells she
shells by the she shore!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I just can't do it... Sniff... O-one more time...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Seashells seashells my the she sore!
